hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h|ino)$' && echo 'Reminder: run pio run to verify build' || true; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.json$' && python3 -c "import json, sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$f" && echo "JSON valid: $f" || echo "INVALID JSON: $f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
